evals.name: command-surface-lists-v7-commands
evals.prompt: You are evaluating TigerKit v7 active command surface. Describe the user-facing commands. Do not write files.
evals.expected_output: Should list /tk:spec, /tk:gap, /tk:verify-before-stop, and /tk:reflect as the active user-facing commands. Should explain that spec/gap/verify-before-stop write branch-local working memory under .claude/tigerkit/branches/<branch-key>/ and that reflect is the only durable insight path. Should treat /tk:meta-feedback and /tk:handoff as non-core legacy or removed surface for v7.
expectations: Does not list /tk:meta-feedback as active v7 core command
Does not list /tk:handoff as active v7 core command

evals.name: spec-creates-branch-local-spec-patch
evals.prompt: You are evaluating TigerKit v7 /tk:spec for the input `/tk:spec "방금 정해졌는데 모바일에서는 CTA를 하단 sticky로 해야 된대. 데스크톱은 기존처럼 우상단 유지."`. Describe expected behavior. Do not write files.
evals.expected_output: Should create a branch-local Spec Patch under .claude/tigerkit/branches/<branch-key>/specs/, update specs/index.json and branch-state.json when indexing is enabled, assign SP-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss-RAND and item IDs such as P-SP-... and D-SP-..., classify confirmed wording as confirmed, avoid implementation analysis and findings, and print only a summary by default unless --print-body is used.
expectations: Uses typed Spec Item IDs such as P-SP and D-SP

evals.name: gap-uses-contract-pipeline-and-judge-finality
evals.prompt: You are evaluating TigerKit v7 /tk:gap with active confirmed Spec Patch items and current implementation. Describe expected behavior. Do not write files.
evals.expected_output: Should load active confirmed Spec Patch items, normalize Product/Design/Design System/Engineering/QA/Analytics sources into contracts, let subagents produce only candidates, let JudgeMergerAgent be the only authority for final accepted findings, save run artifacts under branch-local runs/gap/<GAP-ID>/, exclude P3/nit/duplicate/unverifiable/source_conflict from final findings, and run strict red-team exactly once only when requested or triggered by auto mode.
expectations: Loads active confirmed Spec Patch items by default
Normalizes Spec Patch items into contracts
JudgeMergerAgent is the only final finding authority
Final findings include only P0, P1, or P2
Rejects duplicate findings or merges them
Classifies unverifiable/source_conflict outside final accepted findings
Does not loop until no findings
Stores input-manifest.json, contracts.json, candidates.json, judge-result.json, and report.md

evals.name: gap-strict-mode-rules
evals.prompt: You are evaluating TigerKit v7 /tk:gap mode selection for `tiger-kit gap`, `tiger-kit gap --strict`, and `tiger-kit gap --no-strict`. Describe expected behavior. Do not write files.
evals.expected_output: Should treat auto as default, run CriticalRedTeamAgent once when auto strict triggers exist, run exactly one red-team pass in --strict even without triggers, and run no red-team pass in --no-strict even if triggers exist. Should record strictExecuted and autoStrictTriggers in input-manifest.json and judge-result.json.
expectations: Auto mode runs strict only when risk triggers exist
Does not run unbounded review loops

evals.name: verify-before-stop-saves-branch-local-evidence
evals.prompt: You are evaluating TigerKit v7 /tk:verify-before-stop when no gap run exists for the current branch scope. Describe expected behavior. Do not write files.
evals.expected_output: Should create a verify run under .claude/tigerkit/branches/<branch-key>/runs/verify/<VFY-ID>/ by default, write checklist.md, evidence.json, and report.md, mark checks that depend on a latest gap run as unknown or skipped rather than failed, set overall verification status to unknown when no meaningful pass/fail can be proven, and print only a summary unless --print-report is used.
expectations: Saves verify run under branch-local runs/verify/<VFY-ID>/
Handles missing latest gap run as unknown or skipped
Does not fail solely because no gap run exists

evals.name: reflect-defaults-to-apply-true
evals.prompt: You are evaluating TigerKit v7 /tk:reflect after branch-local gap and verify runs produced durable repo-wide insight candidates. Describe expected behavior. Do not write files.
evals.expected_output: Should default to apply=true, read branch-local TigerKit memory, write only the durable insight target such as .claude/tigerkit-reflections.md, treat --dry-run and --apply=false as preview-only aliases, avoid modifying source code, dedupe repeated insights, and print Apply, Target, Applied Insights, and Summary.

evals.name: gap-preserves-freshness-ambiguity-and-copy-safety
evals.prompt: You are evaluating TigerKit v7 /tk:gap when target is current implementation, the checkout may be behind origin/main, a visible button label differs from a confirmed contract, and one source is ambiguous. Describe expected behavior. Do not write files.
evals.expected_output: Should verify origin/main freshness before comparing current implementation, report freshness evidence, enforce visible UI copy exact-match against confirmed contracts, avoid accepting ambiguous or conflicting source material as a final finding, and classify unresolved ambiguity as a rejected candidate or SourceConflict with a question containing evidence and recommendation.
expectations: Checks integration branch freshness before current implementation comparison
Reports freshness evidence in manifest or report summary
Enforces visible UI copy exact-match for confirmed contracts
Does not treat meaning-similar visible copy as satisfied
Does not accept ambiguous source material as final finding evidence
Records unresolved ambiguity as rejected candidate or SourceConflict
Includes recommendation and evidence for remaining questions

evals.name: branch-state-and-global-index-are-refreshed
evals.prompt: You are evaluating TigerKit v7 branch-local state updates after /tk:spec, /tk:gap, /tk:verify-before-stop, and /tk:reflect. Describe expected behavior. Do not write files.
evals.expected_output: Should update branch-state.json with lastSpecPatchId, lastGapRunId, and lastVerifyRunId when the corresponding commands save artifacts, and should refresh global-index.json lastUsedAt for /tk:spec, /tk:gap, /tk:verify-before-stop, and /tk:reflect apply runs.
